items.title: Reassessing Procter & Gamble (PG) After Recent Share Price Recovery
items.description: If you are wondering whether Procter & Gamble's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, you are not alone in asking what you are really paying for with PG today. The stock last closed at US$157.33, with returns of 2.7% over the past 7 days, 10.9% over the last 30 days, 11.0% year to date, and a 3.5% decline over the past year, alongside gains of 21.3% over 3 years and 39.9% over 5 years. Recent attention on Procter & Gamble has been shaped by ongoing interest in large,...

items.title: Head & Shoulders Launches New Upgraded Collections With Tailored Formulas for Unique Scalp and Hair Types
items.description: CINCINNATI, February 10, 2026--Head & Shoulders, the world's #1 anti-dandruff shampoo, announces the launch of three newly upgraded collections, featuring expertly formulated shampoos and conditioners designed to address the unique needs of every scalp and hair type.

items.title: Procter & Gamble: A Dividend King That's Fairly Valued Amid Macro And Industry Pressures
items.description: Procter & Gamble is rated Hold due to fair valuation, macro pressures, and limited margin of safety at current levels. Click here to read my most recent analysis.
